claims.comparison_population: GERD/hypersensitive esophagus patients vs asymptomatic healthy controls
claims.supporting_quote: 1/3 of asymptomatic subjects had pepsin in saliva at low concentration (0(0-59)ng/mL). Patients with GORD and HO had higher prevalence and pepsin concentration than controls (HO, 237(52-311)ng/mL and GORD, 121(29-252)ng/mL)(p<0.05).
